name: Elodie 24x40 Garage Shed Plan - A Garage Built for Efficiency, Style & Everyday Function
open_features: A long, efficient footprint with a sleek sloped roof - perfect for maximizing usable interior space and fitting seamlessly along property lines.
Straightforward framing, simple roof geometry, and easy-to-follow instructions make this plan ideal for beginners and experienced builders alike.
Three full-size garage bays provide easy access for vehicles, ATVs, equipment, tools, and project materials.
Horizontal grey lap siding, white trim, and modern transom windows create a crisp, modern aesthetic with year-round visual appeal.
description_summary: Kickstart your next property upgrade with the Elodie Garage Shed Plan - a 24x40 modern three-bay garage and workspace solution designed for clean architectural simplicity, incredible functionality, and contemporary curb appeal. With its streamlined single-slope roof, crisp grey siding, upper transom windows, and three oversized garage bays, the Elodie blends modern design with the practical utility homeowners need for vehicles, equipment, tools, and creative workspaces.
